title: Sweet Bouncy Ukrainian Milk Casserole
description: A sweet and nostalgic Ukrainian dish featuring whole milk, perfect for breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, and flour. Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the butter, egg, vanilla extract, and salt until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Sprinkle the chopped walnuts, chocolate chips, and raisins over the top of the casserole.
Return the casserole to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is set.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
